scripts.test:unit: rm -rf .test-dist && tsc -p tests/tsconfig.json && node -e "require('fs').writeFileSync('.test-dist/package.json', JSON.stringify({type:'commonjs'}))" && node --test .test-dist/tests/population-model.test.js .test-dist/tests/effects-model.test.js
scripts.test: npm run build && npm run test:unit && npm run test:e2e
